productName: Green Revolution: Beverage Wildside Blackberry Lemonade 2:1 CBD - 12oz
description: A boutique infused beverage with sweet-tart lemonade notes, a refreshing finish, and the kind of flavor that makes it feel like a treat before the effects even arrive. It blends THC for a classic euphoric lift and CBD to keep things calm and balanced in a 2:1 ratio. A refreshing hybrid option for customers who prefer their cannabis in a drinkable format.
